---
title: "Welcome"
description: "A sample first post for this Quarto site"
date: "2026-01-01"
date-modified: "2026-01-01"
draft: false
categories: [quarto, github-pages]
---

This is a sample post.

Replace this article with your first real post, or delete it after adding your own content.

## What to write

- A short note
- A project update
- A learning log
- A list of useful resources

Quarto supports Markdown, code blocks, figures, tables, citations, and executable code cells.
